case_title: FIRESIDE THRIFT CO. vs. TAUTAGALOA, SALI

docket_entries.description: STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF JUL-02-1998, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO FILE AMENDED PROOF OF SERVICE AND OBTAIN ANSWER FROM OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY FOSTER J DONEHUE. HEARING SET FOR AUG-12-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIRESIDE THRIFT CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAUTAGALOA, SALI $4,096.71 PRINCIPAL, $750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $134.40 INTEREST, $121.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,102.11
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIRESIDE THRIFT CO. SERVED APR-01-1998, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TAUTAGALOA, SALI
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $121.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT TAUTAGALOA, SALI
